description: Pre-GRN sample accountability (change-list 10.1). One row per sample drawn from the inbound lot for testing: item, qty, who took it, when, its lab-custody status and final disposition. Pre-GRN it is a pure custody log (goods not owned yet); the stock movements fire once the GRN posts.

fields.description: Who physically took the sample to the lab.
fields.label: Taken By

fields.description: Issued = logged pre-GRN, no stock yet. In Lab = GRN posted, sample moved RM Store to IQC Lab. Returned = dispositioned out of the lab.
fields.label: Status

fields.description: Set at return. Returned Intact = back to RM Store; Built into Finished Unit = to Production FG; Scrapped = written off.
fields.label: Disposition
fields.options:
Returned Intact
Built into Finished Unit
Scrapped

fields.description: Stock Entry that realised this sample's movement (RM to Lab, or Lab to its disposition). Stored as text, not a Link, so cancelling/reversing the entry is never blocked.
fields.label: Stock Entry

name: IQC Sample
